title: If someone dared you to spend the night in NERVs basement
display_title: If someone dared you to spend the night in NERVs basement
wikitext:
[]: If someone dared you to spend the night in NERV's basement..             Quote Post by Shamonan » Sun Apr 15, 2007 1:24 pm ...would you? Just to say you did? You wouldn't get scared of Terminal Dogma's Antarctic diorama, Lilith pinned to a cross, lake of LCL, room where Rei was born, Eva graveyard, Dummy Plug Reiquarium, and other freaky whatnots that Gendo might have stuffed there over the years??? 8) I know I would (sleep there, that is). I'd just hide in the LCL lake and shut my eyes until morning. At least I wouldn't drown.

[]:             Quote Post by Soljer13 » Sun Apr 15, 2007 1:33 pm id try to make smores with lillith, id get funky with Rei clones, id try mass necromancy in the eva graveyard, and id explore to see what other cool stuff there is.

[]:             Quote Post by Eva Yojimbo » Sun Apr 15, 2007 1:37 pm soljerameelguy wrote: id try to make smores with lillith, id get funky with Rei clones, id try mass necromancy in the eva graveyard, and id explore to see what other cool stuff there is.

[]:             Quote Post by BobBQ » Sun Apr 15, 2007 1:40 pm I'd get bored, unless the Rei clones are far more talkative than they appear.

[]:             Quote Post by Shamonan » Sun Apr 15, 2007 1:40 pm Indeed, Terminal Dogma holds tons of neat stuff...

[]:             Quote Post by Zkh » Sun Apr 15, 2007 3:26 pm I'd put the moves on Lilith.

[]:             Quote Post by Eva Yojimbo » Sun Apr 15, 2007 3:27 pm Zkh wrote: I'd put the moves on Lilith.

[]:             Quote Post by Trigger's Elysium » Sun Apr 15, 2007 3:39 pm Dunno. I'd be tempted to take a dip in the Reiquarium, but i'd probably feel like a perv. I guess I could make a soulless clone of myself? Possibly bring him home and treat him as a disabled brother later? That would be fun for a while I suppose, until that lazy bum stops mooching off of my soul and to get his own. Damn moochers...*shakes fist* Yeah... I'd poke Lillith for fun, and make faces at it. I wonder, does she taste like marshmallows? If I get tired, I could take a nap in Rei's old place. =X

[]:             Quote Post by Soljer13 » Sun Apr 15, 2007 3:40 pm wouldnt it be so freaky if you were in lillith's chamber and out of your peripheral vision lilliths head turned and "looked" at you?

[]:             Quote Post by Trigger's Elysium » Sun Apr 15, 2007 3:44 pm soljerameelguy wrote: wouldnt it be so freaky if you were in lillith's chamber and out of your peripheral vision lilliths head turned and "looked" at you?

[]:             Quote Post by Ayana-Me » Sun Apr 15, 2007 4:18 pm That'd be great to spend the night, cuz I totally know where Aoba keeps his stash!

[]:             Quote Post by Soljer13 » Sun Apr 15, 2007 5:06 pm Aoba: MY MANGA!!!

[]:             Quote Post by slothen » Sun Apr 15, 2007 5:15 pm I would absolutely take a camping trip to terminal Dogma. I would try to climb lilith, sprinkle in some bread crumbs to feed the Rei's, and take a dump in the Eva Graveyard.

[]:             Quote Post by Shamonan » Sun Apr 15, 2007 5:18 pm slothen wrote: I would absolutely take a camping trip to terminal Dogma. I would try to climb lilith, sprinkle in some bread crumbs to feed the Rei's, and take a dump in the Eva Graveyard.

[]:             Quote Post by Anonymous_Evafan » Sun Apr 15, 2007 5:41 pm You'd all be shot for trying something so oooo monumentally stupid as sneaking into a classified government instalation. Shamonan wrote: LOL, don't you have any respect for the organization fighting against God?

[]:             Quote Post by Soljer13 » Sun Apr 15, 2007 5:52 pm Shamonan wrote: slothen wrote: I would absolutely take a camping trip to terminal Dogma. I would try to climb lilith, sprinkle in some bread crumbs to feed the Rei's, and take a dump in the Eva Graveyard.

[]:             Quote Post by Shamonan » Sun Apr 15, 2007 5:52 pm I'd say Gendo Ikari is fighting the Angels in order to fufill his God complex. SEELE is obviously a Jewish cabal, and while not exactly a very flattering one, they later see Ikari as a threat for their own plans. SEELE's own Instrumentality plans may be just as selfish as Gendo's but they may just be following what the Dead Sea Scrolls instructs. After Unit-01 gains an S2 Engine, SEELE describes the incident as 'blasphemy'. While SEELE realizes they have to overcome the Angels just as NERV does, they are still mired in the religious faith and dogma that isn't as present in NERV.

[]:             Quote Post by Soljer13 » Sun Apr 15, 2007 5:53 pm Yui is revealed to be Sammael in EoE

[]:             Quote Post by Shamonan » Sun Apr 15, 2007 5:54 pm Do you mind citing this claim? I don't think Sammael is present in Evangelion at all apart from the drawing of him in the opening credits.

[]:             Quote Post by BobBQ » Sun Apr 15, 2007 5:59 pm soljerameelguy wrote: Yui is revealed to be Sammael in EoE
